abilities.description: Viktor can upgrade each of his abilities at the cost of 100 _Hex Fragments_, which he gains from killing enemies:

abilities.name: Siphon Power
abilities.description: Viktor throws a draining device at the target enemy that deals magic damage.

abilities.name: Gravity Field
abilities.description: Viktor deploys a gravity field at the target location for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Hextech Ray
abilities.description: Viktor fires an energy beam along the target path that deals magic damage to enemies hit and briefly grants sight of the area.

abilities.name: Arcane Storm
abilities.description: Viktor conjures an arcane singularity at the target location, dealing magic damage to enemies within the area and disrupting their channeled abilities.

abilities.name: Crimson Pact
abilities.description: Vladimir gains ability power equal to 4.5% bonus health and bonus health equal to 140% AP.

abilities.name: Transfusion
abilities.description: Vladimir drains blood from the target enemy, dealing magic damage and healing himself.

abilities.name: Sanguine Pool
abilities.description: Vladimir sinks into a pool of blood, becoming untargetable for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Tides of Blood
abilities.description: Vladimir charges for up to 1.5 seconds, during which he increases _Tides of Blood's_ damage over the first second of the channel, and becomes slowed by 20% afterwards for the remaining duration.

abilities.name: Hemoplague
abilities.description: Vladimir spreads a virulent plague at the target location that infects enemies hit for 4 seconds, causing them to take 10% bonus magic damage from all incoming damage.

abilities.name: The Relentless Storm
abilities.description: Whenever Volibear damages at least one enemy with a basic attack or ability, he generates a stack of _The Relentless Storm_ for 6 seconds, refreshing on subsequent damage and stacking up to 5 times.

abilities.name: Thundering Smash
abilities.description: Volibear drops on all fours, gaining bonus movement speed for 4 seconds, doubled while facing a visible enemy champion.

abilities.name: Frenzied Maul
abilities.description: Volibear slashes the target enemy with his claws to deal physical damage, and apply on-hit and on-attack effects.

abilities.name: Sky Splitter
abilities.description: Volibear summons a lightning bolt to strike at the target location after a 2-second delay, granting sight of the area for 2.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Stormbringer
abilities.description: Volibear gains _Stormbringer_ for 12 seconds and leaps to the target location with displacement immunity, granting sight of the area during the travel.

abilities.name: Eternal Hunger
abilities.description: Warwick deals 12 - 46 (based on level)(+ 20% bonus AD)(+ 10% AP)bonus magic damage on-hit.

abilities.name: Jaws of the Beast
abilities.description: Active - Tap: Warwick lunges at the target enemy to bite them, dealing magic damage, applying on-hit and on-attack effects, and healing for a portion of the post-mitigation damage dealt.

abilities.name: Blood Hunt
abilities.description: Warwick senses the nearest enemy champion at the start of the cast time, marking them with _Blood Hunt_ for 8 seconds, gaining both passive bonuses against them regardless of their current health.

abilities.name: Primal Howl
abilities.description: Warwick gains incoming damage reduction for 2.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Infinite Duress
abilities.description: Warwick leaps to the target location with crowd control immunity.

abilities.name: Stone Skin
abilities.description: Whenever Wukong damages an enemy champion, he generates a stack of _Stone Skin_ lasting 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Golden Staff
abilities.description: Wukong empowers his next basic attack within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 175 bonus range, and deal bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Warrior Trickster
abilities.description: Wukong turns invisible for 1 second and dashes to the target location, leaving behind a clone of himself at his casting position.

abilities.name: Nimbus Strike
abilities.description: Wukong dashes to the target enemy's location, dealing physical damage and gaining bonus attack speed for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.description: Wukong spins his staff around for up to 2 seconds, gaining 20% bonus movement speed and becoming unable to basic attack.

abilities.name: Clean Cuts
abilities.description: Feathers shot by Xayah will linger and be planted in the ground at maximum range for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Double Daggers
abilities.description: Xayah throws two Feathers in the target direction that each deal physical damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Deadly Plumage
abilities.description: Xayah enters a frenzy for 4 seconds, gaining bonus attack speed and empowering her basic attacks to fire an additional smaller feather at the target on-hit that deals 20% damage of the triggering attack's damage.

abilities.name: Bladecaller
abilities.description: Xayah recalls all planted Feathers to shoot back to her, each dealing physical damage to enemies hit in their path.

abilities.name: Featherstorm
abilities.description: Xayah leaps into the air, becoming untargetable for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Determination
abilities.description: Xin Zhao's basic attacks on-hit generate a stack of _Determination_, stacking up to 3 times.

abilities.name: Three Talon Strike
abilities.description: Xin Zhao empowers his next three basic attacks on-attack within 5 seconds to each have an uncancellable windup, deal bonus physical damage and reduce his other abilities' current cooldowns by 1 second.

abilities.name: Wind Becomes Lightning
abilities.description: Xin Zhao slashes in an arc and, after the cast time, thrusts his spear in a line in the target direction.

abilities.name: Audacious Charge
abilities.description: Xin Zhao dashes to the target enemy's location, dealing magic damage to enemies near them and slowing them by 30% for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Crescent Guard
abilities.description: Xin Zhao sweeps his spear around him, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies, capped at 600 against monsters, and knocking back all non- _Challenged_ targets hit over 0.5 seconds, as well as stunning them for the same duration.

abilities.name: Way of the Wanderer
abilities.description: Innate - Intent: Yasuo'stotal critical rate is doubled from all other sources. Additionally,「 every 1% critical rate in excess of 100% is converted into 0.6 bonus attack damage. 」「 every 50% critical rate in excess of 100% is converted into

abilities.name: Steel Tempest
abilities.description: Yasuo stabs in a line in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, applies on-hit effects to the first enemy hit, and triggers on-attack effects once.

abilities.name: Wind Wall
abilities.description: Yasuo raises a wall of wind that travels in the target direction over 0.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Sweeping Blade
abilities.description: Yasuo dashes a fixed distance in the direction of the target enemy.

abilities.name: Last Breath
abilities.description: Yasuo blinks to the other side of a visible airborne enemy champion, instantly generating maximum Flow while resetting _Gathering Storm_ stacks.

abilities.name: Way of the Hunter
abilities.description: Innate - Intent: Yone'stotal critical rate is doubled from all other sources. Additionally,「 every 1% critical rate in excess of 100% is converted into 0.6 bonus attack damage. 」「 every 25% critical rate in excess of 100% is converted into

abilities.name: Mortal Steel
abilities.description: Yone stabs in a line in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, applies on-hit effects to the first enemy hit, and triggers on-attack effects once.

abilities.name: Spirit Cleave
abilities.description: Yone cleaves a cone in the target direction, dealing equal parts physical and magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Soul Unbound
abilities.description: Yone dashes a fixed distance in the target direction and enters _Spirit Form_ for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Fate Sealed
abilities.description: Yone prepares a strike over the cast time, then _marks_ all enemies within an area in the target direction, knocking them down and stunning them for 1 second.

abilities.name: Feline Friendship
abilities.description: While _attached_ to an ally, Yuumi grants them 2 permanent _Friendship_ stacks for killing enemy champions and minions.

abilities.name: Prowling Projectile
abilities.description: Active - Hold: Yuumi conjures an errant missile in front of her that flies in the target direction for 2.25 seconds, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit. While the missile is in-flight, she can steer it while still able to move, as

abilities.name: You and Me!
abilities.description: Yuumi channels for 0.25 seconds, then dashes to the target allied champion and attaches to them upon arrival.

abilities.name: Zoomies
abilities.description: Yuumi gains a shield and bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Final Chapter
abilities.description: Yuumi and Book channel for up to 3.5 seconds to launch 7 magical waves in the target direction.

abilities.name: Contempt for the Weak
abilities.description: Zed's basic attacks against targets below 50% maximum health are empowered to deal 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% / 11% (based on level) of the target's maximum health as bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: Razor Shuriken
abilities.description: Zed throws a shuriken in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against targets beyond the first.

abilities.name: Living Shadow
abilities.description: Zed creates a _Shadow_ that dashes to the target location and remains there for 4.5 seconds, being able to mimic _Razor Shuriken_ and _Shadow Slash_ regardless of range.

abilities.name: Shadow Slash
abilities.description: Zed slashes around himself to deal physical damage to nearby enemies, reduced to 60% against monsters, and slow targets hit for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Death Mark
abilities.description: Zed becomes untargetable and, after a 0.6-second delay, he dashes beyond the target enemy champion from his position at the end of the delay over 0.35 seconds.

abilities.name: Living Battery
abilities.description: Moving and shielding charges her; the charge empowers her next Burst Fire.

abilities.name: Burst Fire
abilities.description: Fires a burst of shots (a charged shot when empowered) dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: Ultrashock Laser
abilities.description: Fires a long-range laser that damages and slows the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Spark Surge
abilities.description: Dashes and vaults small walls; empowers her next few attacks.

abilities.name: Lightning Crash
abilities.description: Discharges an AoE burst and overcharges, ramping damage with takedowns.

abilities.name: Short Fuse
abilities.description: Ziggs' abilities deal 24% damage against enemy turrets.

abilities.name: Bouncing Bomb
abilities.description: Ziggs tosses a bomb to the target location that bounces forward up to two times, the distance traveled each time being based on how far it was originally thrown.

abilities.name: Satchel Charge
abilities.description: Ziggs hurls a charge to the target location that remains for 4 seconds, granting sight of the area.

abilities.name: Hexplosive Minefield
abilities.description: Ziggs scatters a cluster of 11 proximity mines over the target location that grant sight of the area for 2 seconds, arming after 0.5 seconds and lasting for up to 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Mega Inferno Bomb
abilities.description: Ziggs catapults the _Mega Inferno Bomb_ to the target location, granting sight within a 600 radius around its destination for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Time in a Bottle
abilities.description: Zilean generates a reserve of "Experience (champion)")20 / 50 / 80 (based on level) experience every 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Time Bomb
abilities.description: Zilean throws a ticking time bomb to the target location that grants sight of its surroundings.

abilities.name: Twisted Timeflow
abilities.description: Zilean grants a shield and _Fleeting Time_ to himself and the nearest allied champion for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Temporal Mirage
abilities.description: Zilean expands a time-bending force field beneath for 2.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Chronoshift
abilities.description: Zilean places a protective time rune on the target allied champion or himself for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: More Sparkles!
abilities.description: After using an ability, Zoe's next basic attack or _Spell Thief_ bolt within 5 seconds becomes non-projectile and deals an additional 9 - 128 (based on level)(+ 20% AP)bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: Paddle Star!
abilities.description: Zoe shoots a star in the target direction that explodes upon hitting an enemy, dealing magic damage to the primary target and 80% of that damage to enemies near them.

abilities.name: Spell Thief
abilities.description: Zoe casts the ability from a _Spell Shard_ that she has picked up.

abilities.name: Sleepy Trouble Bubble
abilities.description: Zoe dropkicks a bubble in the target direction that bursts upon the first enemy hit, otherwise lingering at maximum range over 1 second, then becoming a trap for 5 seconds that bursts upon contact with an enemy.

abilities.name: Portal Jump
abilities.description: After a 0.15-second delay, Zoe blinks in the target direction and remains there for 1 second.

abilities.name: Garden of Thorns
abilities.description: Zyra's abilities spawn _Thorn Spitters_ upon hitting certain targets.

abilities.name: Deadly Spines
abilities.description: Zyra sprouts thorny spines at the target location that burst after a 0.625-seconds delay, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Rampant Growth
abilities.description: Nearby _Thorn Spitters_ become enraged: restoring their current health by a set amount, increasing their maximum health by the same amount, gaining 25% increased size and refreshing their duration.

abilities.name: Grasping Roots
abilities.description: Zyra shoots a surge of vines in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and roots them for a duration.

abilities.name: Stranglethorns
abilities.description: Zyra summons a monstrous thicket at the target location that deals magic damage to enemies hit as it expands.

abilities.name: Absolution
abilities.description: Collects Mist from dead units to permanently gain attack damage and range.

abilities.name: Piercing Darkness
abilities.description: Fires through allies (healing) and enemies (damaging).

abilities.name: Last Embrace
abilities.description: Roots the first enemy hit (and nearby enemies after a delay).

abilities.name: Curse of the Black Mist
abilities.description: Wraiths herself and nearby allies, granting camouflage.

abilities.name: Dawning Shadow
abilities.description: Global laser that shields allies and damages enemies.

abilities.name: Damnation
abilities.description: Thresh's armor does not increase through growth (per level).

abilities.name: Death Sentence
abilities.description: Thresh throws out his scythe in the target direction, becoming unable to move or attack while it is in flight.

abilities.name: Dark Passage
abilities.description: Thresh throws his lantern to the target location over 0.5 seconds, lasting for 6 seconds while he remains nearby and granting sight of its surroundings.

abilities.name: Flay
abilities.description: Thresh sweeps his chain across the ground in a broad line and a radius around him, starting behind him and towards the target direction.

abilities.name: The Box
abilities.description: Thresh erects a pentagon of spectral walls around him that each last for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Pyromania
abilities.description: Innate - Pyromania: Annie generates a stack of _Pyromania_ whenever she casts an ability, stacking up to 4 times, at which she gains _Energized_.

abilities.name: Disintegrate
abilities.description: Annie hurls a fireball in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit and all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Incinerate
abilities.description: Annie releases fire in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit.

abilities.name: Molten Shield
abilities.description: Annie grants herself and Tibbers a shield for 3 seconds and bonus movement speed that decays over 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Summon: Tibbers
abilities.description: Annie summons Tibbers to the target location in a burst of flame, dealing magic damage to enemies near him.

abilities.name: Cosmic Creator
abilities.description: Stardust from abilities permanently increases his ability damage and stats.

abilities.name: Breath of Light
abilities.description: Channels a sustained beam dealing magic damage per second to enemies.

abilities.name: Astral Flight
abilities.description: Flies in a direction, able to keep casting Breath of Light.

abilities.name: Singularity
abilities.description: Forms a black hole that pulls and deals magic damage per tick.

abilities.name: Falling Star / The Skies Descend
abilities.description: Drops a star that stuns and deals magic damage; empowered at max Stardust.

abilities.name: Traveler's Call
abilities.description: 50 • 8 - 4 (based on number of Chimes)

abilities.name: Cosmic Binding
abilities.description: Bard fires an energy bolt in the target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit and slows them by 60% for a duration.

abilities.name: Caretaker's Shrine
abilities.description: Bard conjures a shrine at the target location that grants sight of its surroundings for 1 second and gathers power over 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Magical Journey
abilities.description: Bard opens a one-way magical corridor through a piece of terrain in the target direction for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Tempered Fate
abilities.description: Bard sends magical energy arcing to the target location, granting sight of the area during travel.
